chapters.title: Before you start (ITR-3)
chapters.subtitle: Text guide only — portal screenshots arrive when the intern Word pack is ready.
tips: This is a text scaffold for ITR-3. Screenshot walkthrough needs the intern Word file.
warnings: Do not invent numbers. Use LastMinute compute values when unlocked.

steps.title: Open portal
steps.plainEnglish: Open the Income Tax portal in a new tab beside LastMinute.

steps.title: Confirm ITR-3
steps.clickPath: File Income Tax Return → select form
steps.plainEnglish: Only continue if LastMinute routed you to ITR-3.

chapters.title: Login and start filing
chapters.subtitle: Same login path as ITR-1; pick the correct form on the portal.

steps.title: Login
steps.plainEnglish: Sign in with PAN/Aadhaar.

steps.title: AY 2026-27 Online
steps.plainEnglish: Select AY 2026-27 and Online mode.

steps.title: Select ITR-3
steps.plainEnglish: Choose ITR-3 and proceed.

chapters.title: Business P&L (books of account)
chapters.subtitle: Income Sources → Business & Profession
warnings: Use audited or signed P&L figures — not bank credits alone.
Do not enter presumptive 44AD/44ADA percentages here — ITR-3 requires actual books.

steps.title: Gross receipts / turnover (books)
steps.plainEnglish: Total revenue per P&L before expenses.

steps.title: Total business expenses
steps.plainEnglish: Allowable expenses from books — must support net profit.

steps.title: Net profit from business
steps.plainEnglish: Receipts minus expenses per our P&L mapping.

steps.title: Net business income (head total)
steps.plainEnglish: Final business head after adjustments — verify on portal.

steps.title: Presumptive income u/s 44AD
steps.plainEnglish: ITR-3 uses regular books, not presumptive turnover percentages.

steps.title: Presumptive income u/s 44ADA
steps.plainEnglish: Professionals on presumptive scheme should file ITR-4, not ITR-3.

chapters.title: Capital gains (if applicable)
chapters.subtitle: Income Sources → Capital Gains
warnings: Many ITR-3 filers have no capital gains — skip entire schedule when all CG values are zero.
Separate business income from investment gains — wrong schedule causes defective return.

steps.title: STCG u/s 111A
steps.plainEnglish: Enter when broker reported listed equity short-term gains.

steps.title: LTCG u/s 112A
steps.plainEnglish: Taxable listed equity LTCG after annual exemption.

steps.title: Other capital gains
steps.plainEnglish: Property, unlisted, or debt fund gains at applicable rates.

steps.title: Entire Schedule CG
steps.plainEnglish: Skip all CG rows when our summary shows zero across STCG and LTCG.

chapters.title: Salary (if mixed income)
chapters.subtitle: Income Sources → Salary
chapters.portalPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
warnings: Business-only filers should skip salary entirely.
Side employment while running a business still needs Form 16 values entered.

steps.title: Gross salary u/s 17(1)
steps.clickPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
steps.plainEnglish: Enter when you also had salary alongside business income.

steps.title: Standard deduction u/s 16(ia)
steps.clickPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
steps.plainEnglish: Apply when salary head is active.

steps.title: Net salary income
steps.clickPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
steps.plainEnglish: Verify combined salary head matches our computation.

steps.title: Entire salary schedule
steps.clickPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
steps.plainEnglish: Skip when gross salary is zero — business-only return.

chapters.title: Deductions and tax benefits
chapters.subtitle: Deductions → Chapter VI-A
warnings: Business expenses belong in Schedule BP, not 80C — do not double-count.
New regime limits most deductions; confirm regime toggle first.

steps.title: Section 80C
steps.plainEnglish: Personal investments — separate from business P&L expenses.

steps.title: Section 80D
steps.plainEnglish: Health insurance for self and parents when old regime applies.

steps.title: Section 80CCD(1B)
steps.plainEnglish: Additional NPS contribution beyond 80C.

steps.title: Section 80CCD(2)
steps.plainEnglish: Employer NPS — allowed in both regimes.

steps.title: Section 80G
steps.plainEnglish: Charitable donations after eligible limits.

steps.title: Section 80U
steps.plainEnglish: Select No when disability deduction does not apply.

steps.title: Section 80TTA / 80TTB
steps.plainEnglish: Deselect if savings-interest deduction is zero in our summary.

chapters.title: Balance sheet (Part A-BS)
chapters.subtitle: Financial Particulars → Balance Sheet
warnings: LastMinute ITR does not compute balance sheet figures yet.
Consult your CA or use audited books — do not invent asset values.

steps.title: Fixed assets
steps.plainEnglish: Not computed in our engine — enter from your books or skip if portal allows.

steps.title: Current assets (cash, debtors, stock)
steps.plainEnglish: Requires full books — outside current companion scope.

steps.title: Capital account / liabilities
steps.plainEnglish: Balance sheet is mandatory for ITR-3 audit cases — use professional help.

steps.title: Schedule AL (assets & liabilities)
steps.plainEnglish: Skip unless income exceeds ₹50L threshold requiring AL disclosure.

chapters.title: Tax computation
chapters.subtitle: Tax Paid and Verification → Part D
chapters.portalPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
warnings: Business income plus CG may trigger advance-tax interest — verify Part D carefully.
Match TDS on professional receipts with 26AS before claiming credit.

steps.title: Gross total income
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: All heads combined — salary, business, CG, and other sources.

steps.title: Total Chapter VI-A deductions
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: Chapter VI-A total in old regime.

steps.title: Net tax payable / refund
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: Final amount owed or refunded after all credits.

steps.title: TDS on salary
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: Form 16 TDS when salary is present.

steps.title: TDS on other income
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: 26AS credits on FD, contracts, and brokerage.

steps.title: Advance / self-assessment tax
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: Challan payments for business advance tax.

chapters.title: E-verify and receipt
chapters.subtitle: Same Aadhaar OTP path as ITR-1 after preview/submit.

steps.title: Preview and submit
steps.plainEnglish: Preview totals, then submit on the portal.

steps.title: E-verify with Aadhaar OTP
steps.plainEnglish: Verify within 30 days. Download the receipt.
